text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy takes first place in the
Takarazuka Kinen fan polls, while Sweep Tosho
fails to break the top twenty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"There's just no way someone from the Triple
Tiara tour would stand a chance against Triple
Crown tour runners in a medium-distance race.
Not to mention a senior-year one."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it becomes clear just how widespread this
sentiment is, Sweep Tosho gets even more
motivated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's going to defeat Zenno Rob Roy, who has
followed through on her promise to become a
hero, and seize the moment to cast a spell that
will change the world.
